channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Burrow, Chase lift Bengals after botched blocked punt by Cowboys in 27-20 Cincinnati victory
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals finally got a break. The Dallas Cowboys had flashbacks to one of the most painful moments in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: MLB Winter Meetings Blog: Bregman & more Astros notes
item.description: The Astros have stated for months their priority is to re-sign Alex Bregman. They have an offer on the table, but a handful of teams have now entered the Bregman race with Juan Soto off the board.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Green Bay basketball coach Doug Gottlieb puts former Bay Area preps star on blast
item.description: Former Dublin basketball star and NCAA Division I leading scorer Anthony Roy was benched after failing to show up to a shootaround.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit for opener in Japan, but not be on the mound
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to be ready to hit when the reigning World Series champions open their season in Japan against the Chicago Cubs on March 18 and 19.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former Auburn coach Harsin linked to Cal’s offensive coordinator job
item.description: Harsin, who was fired amid controversy at Auburn two years ago, reportedly close to joining Wilcox's staff with the Cal Bears.
item.dc:creator: Laurence Miedema, The Mercury News

item.title: Soto's record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets reverberates through Major League Baseball
item.description: Juan Soto’s record $765 million, 15-year contract with the New York Mets, the largest and longest deal in baseball history, has reverberated across the winter meetings.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum And Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tennessee grabs No. 1 in AP Top 25 after shakeup; No. 3 Iowa State has highest ranking since 1950s
item.description: Tennessee is the new No. 1 in men's college basketball after a massive shakeup in the AP Top 25. The Vols received 58 first-place votes from a 62-person media panel Monday to reach No. 1 for the first time since the 2018-19 season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 19 Tennessee back in women's AP Top 25 after year out of poll; UCLA, UConn remain 1-2
item.description: Tennessee has returned to The Associated Press Top 25 at No. 19, ending the school's longest drought in the 48-year history of the women's basketball poll. The Lady Vols (7-0) had not been ranked since Nov. 27, 2023, a span of 22 polls.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Falcons should 'roll the dice' and start Michael Penix Jr amid Kirk Cousins struggles, Super Bowl champ says
item.description: Atlanta Falcons quarterback Kirk Cousins is facing enormous pressure and one Super Bowl champion is calling on the team to make a change in the final few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LIV Golf star Phil Mickelson's 'random thoughts' include Daniel Penny take
item.description: Golf icon Phil Mickelson shared his "random thoughts" on Sunday night, which included a take on Daniel Penny, who is going through a trial in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panthers' Bryce Young receives praise for prayer as Eagles player suffers injury
item.description: Carolina Panthers quarterback Bryce Young received praise on Sunday for taking a moment to pray when Philadelphia Eagles safety C.J. Gardner-Johnson got hurt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kyle Whittingham will return for 2025 season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a simple two word statement that made a resounding statement throughout the University of Utah athletic department. "I'm back." And with that, Utes head football coach Kyle Whittingham announced he will return to the program for his 21st season in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chris Paul moves into 2nd on NBA's career assists list against Pelicans
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — San Antonio Spurs point guard Chris Paul moved to second on the NBA's all-time assists list against the New Orleans Pelicans, the franchise where his 20-year career began, on Sunday The 39-year-old Paul collected his 12,092nd assist on a 3-pointer from Victor Wembanyama with 7:06
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A hamstring injury silenced George Pickens. His Steelers teammates picked up the slack vs. Browns
item.description: Pickens missed the first game of his career on Sunday, watching from the sideline in Pittsburgh's 27-14 win over Cleveland that showcased the team's receivers group runs deeper than the unit's talented if occasionally petulant star.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes drop five-set thriller to Marquette to end season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's volleyball team rallied from being down two sets to none against Marquette, only to lose the fifth and deciding set 15-12 to end their incredible turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
